title: Back
body:
My first post in over a month and a half—summer, the new job, Olivia, Twitter, etc., etc. These aren’t excuses, but I haven’t found a quiet moment until this weekend, when we stayed home. It’s also my first post on my new Asus Eee PC 901 running Linux; I’m already getting used to the tiny keys. Among many other things, I still need to write a post about this new gadget of mine. I haven’t written here, but I’ve stayed active on Twitter and to some extent on Facebook, where personal and professional topics mix more. On our blog diluvi.com and on Flickr, we’ve been (especially her) a bit more active. Well, this is just an intro to see if I feel inspired to write some posts about:

1.  my new personal chapter: Olivia
2.  my new professional chapter: TID
3.  my new gadget: Asus Eee 901
4.  a new blog: neva.cat
